title: Oil Prices Surge Amid Iran Tensions and Hormuz Shipping Disruptions
shortdescription: Global financial markets swing as investors react to Iran tensions and disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz.
description: Global financial markets swing as investors react to Iran tensions and disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz.
author: Mark Blaze

title: January Jobs Report: Hiring Tops Expectations as Unemployment Falls to 4.3%
shortdescription: The US added 130,000 jobs in January 2026, beating forecasts as unemployment fell to 4.3%. Strong headlines mask weak trends and heavy 2025 revisions.
description: The US added 130,000 jobs in January 2026, beating forecasts as unemployment fell to 4.3%. Strong headlines mask weak trends and heavy 2025 revisions.
author: Macro Anton

title: Gallup Poll: U.S. Confidence in Markets Rebounds, Worries Over Prices and Employment Persist
shortdescription: Americans expect stock market and economic growth to improve in 2026, but most still worry about rising inflation, unemployment, and household costs, Gallup finds.
description: Americans expect stock market and economic growth to improve in 2026, but most still worry about rising inflation, unemployment, and household costs, Gallup finds.
author: Macro Anton
